Fulham Football Club is a professional football club based in Fulham, West London, England. Founded in 1879, it is the oldest established football club in London to play professionally.


== History ==
Fulham was founded in 1879 as Fulham St Andrew's Church Sunday School.
=== Early years ===
The club turned professional in 1898 and joined the Southern League the following year.


== Stadium ==
Fulham play their home games at Craven Cottage, on the banks of the River Thames, where they have played since 1896.


== External links ==
